full_text:
He Guan (Juzhong) 何觀 (巨忠)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Guan (何觀), styledJuzhong (巨忠). As the eldest son of He Sui, he matched his father in integrity. In 303, he successfully helped fight Zhang Chang’s rebellion. He Guan was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
